title: Spinning tomato crosshair
description: Changes the texture of the crosshair to a spinning meme tomato.
body:
The resource pack changes the texture of a **boring crosshair** to the **ADHD** texture of a **spinning tomato**. 

![crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aba3d6690e0acd4edbaea9b89cb75d6d04c41a5.gif)
